candidate.completion: lower your standards and call it chemistry.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please lower your standards and call it chemistry.

evaluation.rationale: The turn is clean and self-discrediting: loneliness is recast as asking someone to downgrade desire and rename it romance. "Call it chemistry" is a precise finish, though the line lands a bit bluntly rather than elegantly.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
